prompt: A stylized Japanese fashion magazine cover titled MODE TOKYO, designed like a glossy contemporary women's style publication. The composition is a high-angle, dynamic street-fashion anime illustration of 2 girls looking up toward the viewer from beside a brick wall with colorful graffiti and dramatic sunlight. The girl on the right has golden blonde hair in a lively messy ponytail with loose bangs, bright green eyes, a wide cheerful grin, and a sporty-feminine outfit: a light blue lace-trim camisole or slip-style top, short bottoms, chunky white sneakers, and a black choker. She is posed energetically, leaning forward with one knee bent, giving a confident summer-fashion editorial feel. The girl on the left has long vivid teal-green hair with straight heavy bangs, large blue eyes, and a calm, cool expression. She wears a casual layered street outfit in dark tones with a sleeveless top and sits lower in the frame, angled toward the right girl while gazing upward. Use bold cel-shaded anime rendering with crisp linework, glossy highlights in the hair and eyes, soft skin shading, and a polished commercial illustration finish. The background should combine sunlit urban texture, blurred mural colors in pink, purple, orange, and black, and deep shadows to create contrast. The overall palette mixes hot pink typography, summer sunlight, teal, blonde, and saturated street-art hues. Include dense magazine-cover typography in a premium editorial layout: a giant pink serif masthead reading MODE across the top with TOKYO vertically on the left; on the upper right a dark circular or rounded block containing 06, JUNE 2024, vol.218, and cover lines in Japanese; on the left side several smaller Japanese and English fashion blurbs including NEO BASIC STYLE and SPORTY × FEMININE; a pink circular badge on the right with Japanese text and Trend 7; a large hot-pink Japanese headline across the lower left and center reading 私らしく、もっと輝く季節。; elegant white handwritten script diagonally across the lower right reading Shine in my Style; small footer cover lines and hashtags in Japanese; and a small BEAUTY label at bottom right. Make it look exactly like a real high-end Japanese fashion magazine cover, vertical format, full bleed, vibrant, youthful, feminine, sporty, and trendy.
